name: Penang (Malaysia)

colors.symbolism: peace and tranquility; the sea around Penang Island

description: A vertical tricolour of light blue, white and yellow charged in the centre with a stylised areca-nut palm tree (Pinang).
history: The state flag of Penang (Pulau Pinang). Adopted in 1949 (then a Crown Colony of Britain) and retained after Penang became a Malaysian state in 1957. The areca-nut palm is Penang's namesake (pinang = areca nut).

features.symbolism: the namesake of Penang (pinang = areca nut)
